notes: Twitter/X is a low-value route data source. Content is authentication-walled and unstructured. The two routes below were surfaced from news reports quoting LTFRB/DOTr tweets — not extracted directly from Twitter. Platform is useful only for confirming announcements already reported elsewhere.

routes.frequency_notes: Introduced during PNR Metro Commuter Line suspension; service status post-2023 unconfirmed
routes.notes: Southbound path only. Announced by LTFRB/DOTr via Twitter in 2023 during PNR suspension for NSCR construction. Cross-reference with ltfrb-bus-routes.md for current status.

routes.frequency_notes: 5 units per route; electric minibuses (20-seater); DOTr/GET Philippines operated; launched Sept 2025
routes.notes: DOTr/GET Philippines 20-seater electric minibus routes from Valenzuela Gateway Complex. Launched Sept 2025. Exact alignment unknown. Two routes total (Manila/Pasay + Quezon City). Only confirmed from secondary sources quoting DOTr announcement.
Companion route to Valenzuela-Manila route. Same DOTr/GET Philippines electric minibus service. Exact alignment not available from Twitter source.
